judge_scores.reasoning: The model incorrectly attributes the R$600 benefit to Lula's government, when it was established by Bolsonaro's government through PEC 1/2022.
The model incorrectly attributes the establishment of the R$600 value to Lula, when in fact it was introduced by Bolsonaro's government through the Auxílio Brasil under PEC 1/2022 in 2022.

The response incorrectly and confidently attributes the R$600 minimum benefit to Lula's government, when in fact it was established by Bolsonaro through PEC 1/2022 in July 2022 as part of the Auxílio Brasil program.
